Given an OVE cluster with 3 control plane nodes
And all the IRI registries are accessible
And api-int does not resolve exclusively to master-0

When the registry on master-0 becomes unreachable,

Then only MachineConfigNode master-0 should be degraded
And the InternalReleaseImage resource should be degraded
And the cluster should remain able to serve (degraded) release images via api-int
